reviews.review_description: Yea i love and live for japanese and thats why I got this game! But you should make a version where you get to move her arms/your arms Because this is basically a phone game but in 360 because all you do is experience the good animation and choose options I mean yea you get to take pictures and yea you get to pick what drink she/you wants but you dont get the whole vr experience like you should be able to at least move around your arms so you can drink and actually pet the dog and hold the phone to take pictures with your actual hands honestly all you do is listen, take pictures, read, and choose for 22 dollars like I think this game should be 10 or 15 dollars but sitting there and choosing for 22 DOLLARS?! yea no.. Also its extremely short like seriously i was done in 15 minutes 15 MINUTES! FOR 22 DOLLARS yea no this game is definitely a 10 dollars game.. So not worth it in my opinion just a opinion though
